title: System and method for tracking an oral care device
abstract: A method and system for monitoring the location of an oral care device (102) within the mouth of a user, includes: an oral care device (102) having a light source (104); an optical sensor (112) configured to receive light emitted by the light source and to receive light reflected from a user using the oral care device; a computing device (110) adapted to receive and process signals generated by the optical sensor, and programmed to: detect at least one facial feature of the user from the received light reflected from a user; estimate the location of the user's teeth according to the detected facial feature; determine a location of the light source according to the received emitted light; compare the location of the light source to the location of the teeth to estimate the position of the oral care device with respect to the teeth of the user.
claims: 1. A method for determining, using an oral care system comprising an oral care device and a computing device separate from the oral care device, a location of the oral care device within a user's mouth, comprising the steps of: emitting, by a first light source located on the oral care device inside the user's mouth, light through a cheek of the user; generating, by an optical sensor of the computing device located outside the user's mouth, a first light signal in response to receiving the light emitted by the first light source through the cheek of the user; identifying, by the computing device from the generated first light signal, a location of the first light source; identifying, by the computing device from the first light signal, at least one feature of the user's face, captured by the optical sensor of the computing device; estimating, by the computing device, a location of the user's teeth according to the identified at least one feature of the user's face; and comparing, by the computing device, the location of the first light source with the estimated location of the user's teeth to determine a position of the oral care device with respect to the user's teeth.
